input: So in my React component, I'm calling usestate to manage the form data, but I keep forgetting to import it properly.
ideal: So in my React component, I'm calling useState to manage the form data, but I keep forgetting to import it properly.

input: The main wrapper is called appcontainer and it handles all the routing logic between the different views.
ideal: The main wrapper is called AppContainer and it handles all the routing logic between the different views.

input: We're building a small llm to run locally on consumer hardware, so we need to optimize for GPU inference.
ideal: We're building a small LLM to run locally on consumer hardware, so we need to optimize for GPU inference.

input: Just check your package dot json to make sure the api version matches what the backend is expecting.
ideal: Just check your package.json to make sure the API version matches what the backend is expecting.

input: The styles aren't loading because I forgot to import the css module at the top of the file.
ideal: The styles aren't loading because I forgot to import the CSS module at the top of the file.

input: I have my environment variables in env, local for development, but I need to remember to copy them to the production server.
ideal: I have my environment variables in .env.local for development, but I need to remember to copy them to the production server.

input: The useeffect hook is running twice because of React's strict mode in development, which is actually the correct behavior.
ideal: The useEffect hook is running twice because of React's strict mode in development, which is actually the correct behavior.

input: So the problem is in next, config, js where I set the rewrites but forgot to add the trailing slash, and also the image component needs the gpu acceleration flag for the onnx runtime to work properly with the llm inference.
ideal: So the problem is in next.config.js where I set the rewrites but forgot to add the trailing slash, and also the image component needs the GPU acceleration flag for the ONNX runtime to work properly with the LLM inference.

input: You'll need to update your tsconfig to include the new path aliases, otherwise the imports will break in production.
ideal: You'll need to update your tsconfig.json to include the new path aliases, otherwise the imports will break in production.

input: I'm importing the usereducer hook from React but it's not working because I forgot to pass the initial state.
ideal: I'm importing the useReducer hook from React but it's not working because I forgot to pass the initial state.

input: I'm writing a Python class called userrepository and it handles all the database calls for the app.
ideal: I'm writing a Python class called UserRepository and it handles all the database calls for the app.

input: The migration script is in scripts slash run migrations dot py and you have to run it before the tests.
ideal: The migration script is in scripts/run_migrations.py and you have to run it before the tests.

input: The appcontainer component wraps everything so you need to make sure it's imported in layout dot tsx.
ideal: The AppContainer component wraps everything so you need to make sure it's imported in layout.tsx.

input: We're seeing gpu memory issues on the mchips when running the onnx runtime in the background.
ideal: We're seeing GPU memory issues on the M chips when running the ONNX runtime in the background.

input: The usecallback dependency array is empty but you're referencing a variable that changes on every render.
ideal: The useCallback dependency array is empty but you're referencing a variable that changes on every render.

input: Make sure to commit your package lock dot json otherwise the ci pipeline will fail on the install step.
ideal: Make sure to commit your package-lock.json otherwise the CI pipeline will fail on the install step.

input: All the Swift views inherit from viewcontroller, which is fine for now but we should move to swiftui eventually.
ideal: All the Swift views inherit from ViewController, which is fine for now but we should move to SwiftUI eventually.

input: I need to update the next, config to add the api rewrites but the middleware is blocking the request.
ideal: I need to update the next.config to add the API rewrites but the middleware is blocking the request.

input: So I'm looking at this usememo hook and it's not memoizing the llm inference results even though the gpu is available.
ideal: So I'm looking at this useMemo hook and it's not memoizing the LLM inference results even though the GPU is available.

input: The SQL query is doing a select star from users where the created at column is in the last 30 days.
ideal: The SQL query is doing a SELECT * FROM users WHERE the created_at column is in the last 30 days.

input: Check your tsconfig, the jsx compiler option should be set to react jsx not the old transform.
ideal: Check your tsconfig, the JSX compiler option should be set to react-jsx not the old transform.

input: I keep forgetting to add the env, local to gitignore and then my api keys end up in the repo.
ideal: I keep forgetting to add the .env.local to .gitignore and then my API keys end up in the repo.

input: The onnx runtime isn't loading because you're trying to use it in a web worker without the proper wasm setup.
ideal: The ONNX runtime isn't loading because you're trying to use it in a web worker without the proper WASM setup.

input: I need to add a new interface called userprops to define the shape of the data coming from the api.
ideal: I need to add a new interface called UserProps to define the shape of the data coming from the API.

input: The dockerfile is trying to copy package dot json but you renamed it to package lock dot json by mistake.
ideal: The Dockerfile is trying to copy package.json but you renamed it to package-lock.json by mistake.

input: I'm seeing a warning about the viewport meta tag in next, config, you need to move that to the metadata api.
ideal: I'm seeing a warning about the viewport meta tag in next.config, you need to move that to the metadata API.

input: The bash script sources bashrc at startup but on macs you actually want to source bash profile instead.
ideal: The bash script sources .bashrc at startup but on Macs you actually want to source .bash_profile instead.

input: So in the react component, I'm importing usestate and usecontext from the library, but the linter is complaining that usestate is never reassigned.
ideal: So in the React component, I'm importing useState and useContext from the library, but the linter is complaining that useState is never reassigned.

input: The function is called calculatetokenoverlap and it's used by the rag pipeline to handle chunking.
ideal: The function is called calculate_token_overlap and it's used by the RAG pipeline to handle chunking.

input: I think we should rename handlesubmit to something clearer since we now have both handlesubmit and handleformsubmit in the same file.
ideal: I think we should rename handleSubmit to something clearer since we now have both handleSubmit and handleFormSubmit in the same file.

input: I need to update the api endpoint in next, config to point to the staging server, but every time I edit next, config the dev server crashes with a syntax error.
ideal: I need to update the API endpoint in next.config to point to the staging server, but every time I edit next.config the dev server crashes with a syntax error.

input: Make sure you don't commit env, local to git because env, local has all the production secrets, and we already had one incident where someone leaked env, local last month.
ideal: Make sure you don't commit .env.local to git because .env.local has all the production secrets, and we already had one incident where someone leaked .env.local last month.

input: The docker compose file has a service called postgresdb but the env var references it as postgres db with a space, so the connection fails.
ideal: The docker-compose file has a service called postgresdb but the env var references it as postgres_db with a space, so the connection fails.

input: We're using yaml to configure the ci cd pipeline and the github actions workflow is in dot github slash workflows slash deploy dot yml.
ideal: We're using YAML to configure the CI/CD pipeline and the GitHub Actions workflow is in .github/workflows/deploy.yml.

input: The component library exports a defaultlayout component that includes the navbar and footer, so every page should wrap its content with defaultlayout to keep the design consistent.
ideal: The component library exports a DefaultLayout component that includes the navbar and footer, so every page should wrap its content with DefaultLayout to keep the design consistent.

input: The build is failing because it can't find tsconfig, even though tsconfig is right there in the root directory, so I don't understand why the compiler is complaining about missing tsconfig.
ideal: The build is failing because it can't find tsconfig.json, even though tsconfig.json is right there in the root directory, so I don't understand why the compiler is complaining about missing tsconfig.json.

input: So in the usecallback hook, we're memoizing the function itself, not the result. That's the key difference between usecallback and usememo.
ideal: So in the useCallback hook, we're memoizing the function itself, not the result. That's the key difference between useCallback and useMemo.

input: The errorboundary component wraps your route components to catch JavaScript errors anywhere in their child component tree.
ideal: The ErrorBoundary component wraps your route components to catch JavaScript errors anywhere in their child component tree.

input: We're training a small llm to run on consumer gpus, so we need to quantize the weights down to four bits.
ideal: We're training a small LLM to run on consumer GPUs, so we need to quantize the weights down to four bits.

input: Check your package dot json to make sure react and react dom are both on version eighteen.
ideal: Check your package.json to make sure react and react-dom are both on version 18.
